name: Carter Smith
tagline: Mechanical engineer driven by curiosity and a desire to use technology to solve problems.
subtitle: Brown University — Class of 2027
bio: As a junior at Brown University, I am working towards a degree in Mechanical Engineering while competing for Brown's Division 1 men's soccer team. My fascination with technological advancement, sparked by childhood toys and a rigorous math and physics education, matured into a hunger for solving engineering challenges.
work_intro: My work is comprised of passion projects, class assignments, and labs.
